params.demand: Arbiter-specific demand data encoded by the escrow creator.
params.escrowUid: The UID of the escrow attestation being fulfilled.
params.fulfillment: The EAS attestation being used as fulfillment.

params.commitDeadline: Relative reveal deadline, in seconds after commit, from the escrow demand.

params.claimer: Recipient that will be stored on the fulfillment attestation.
params.data: Obligation data that will be revealed.
params.refUID: Reference UID that will be stored on the fulfillment attestation.

params.data: Revealed data (must match a prior commit) and salt.
Revealed data (must match a prior commit) and salt.
params.recipient: The address to set as the attestation recipient.

params.expirationTime: EAS expiration timestamp, or zero for no expiration.
params.refUID: Reference UID stored on the EAS attestation.

returns._0: Whether the resolver supports ETH transfers.

params.values: Explicit ETH amounts which were sent with each attestation.

returns._0: Whether all the attestations are valid.

params.attestations: The existing attestations to be revoked.
params.values: Explicit ETH amounts which were sent with each revocation.

returns._0: Whether the attestations can be revoked.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params.escrowContract: Escrow contract to collect after reveal.
params.escrowUid: UID of the escrow attestation being fulfilled.
params.recipient: Recipient to set on the fulfillment attestation; must        equal the original committer and reveal caller.

returns.collectResult: Return data from the escrow contract's `collect` call.
returns.fulfillmentUid: UID of the created fulfillment attestation.

params.attestation: The existing attestation to be revoked.

returns._0: Whether the attestation can be revoked.

params._slashedBondRecipient: New recipient for slashed bonds; address(0) burns the native token.

params.commitment: The commitment hash whose bond is being slashed.

supportsInterface(bytes4).details: Returns true if this contract implements the interface defined by `interfaceId`. See the corresponding https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-165#how-interfaces-are-identified[ERC section] to learn more about how these ids are created. This function call must use less than 30 000 gas.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

returns._0: Semver contract version as a string.

ATTESTATION_SCHEMA().notice: UID of the schema used by attestations created by this contract.

attest((bytes32,bytes32,uint64,uint64,ui.notice: Processes an attestation and verifies whether it's valid.

commit(bytes32,uint256).notice: Records a commitment hash, locking msg.value as its bond.

computeCommitment(bytes32,address,(bytes.notice: Pure helper to compute the commitment expected by this contract.

doObligation((bytes,bytes32,bytes32),byt.notice: Creates a fulfillment attestation containing the payload and salt.         Validates the commitment, enforces the reveal deadline, and         atomically returns the committed bond to the committer.

doObligationFor((bytes,bytes32,bytes32),.notice: Creates a fulfillment attestation with an explicit recipient.         The reveal caller, original committer, and attestation recipient         must all be the same address.

doObligationRaw(bytes,uint64,bytes32).notice: Creates an obligation attestation from pre-encoded data.

getObligationData(bytes32).notice: Loads and decodes this contract's obligation data from an attestation UID.

getSchema().notice: Returns the schema record registered for this attester.

isPayable().notice: Checks if the resolver can be sent ETH.

multiAttest((bytes32,bytes32,uint64,uint.notice: Processes multiple attestations and verifies whether they are valid.

multiRevoke((bytes32,bytes32,uint64,uint.notice: Processes revocation of multiple attestation and verifies they can be revoked.

revealAndCollect((bytes,bytes32,bytes32).notice: Reveals a fulfillment and immediately collects the target escrow.

revoke((bytes32,bytes32,uint64,uint64,ui.notice: Processes an attestation revocation and verifies if it can be revoked.

setSlashedBondRecipient(address).notice: Updates the recipient for slashed commitment bonds.

slashBond(bytes32).notice: Slashes the bond for a commitment whose deadline has passed without a valid reveal.

version().notice: Returns the full semver contract version.
